name: EMCC.Library
description: EMCC Library — wraps the Codex protocol (Librarian agent + wiki scaffolding-and-sync tooling for consuming projects).

librarian.instantiation: always-on (the agent that ingests, routes, validates inside a consuming-project's wiki)

auditor.instantiation: on-demand (Regime B; Library inherits DFDU's Auditor verbatim — same 116-line persona)

consumes: spade0704/EMCC.DFDU (when Library runs Lattice 3.0 sessions for its own development)
produces_for: consuming projects via bootstrap.py — scaffolds wiki/<projectname>/ directory in those projects
consumed_by: spade0704/EMCC (orchestrator metadata + consumer-project template; status flipped not-ready → ready in this session B7 cross-repo commit)
codex_version_at_extraction: v1.0 (project-codex c106155 2026-05-22) — v1.1 update arc deferred to Session 2 / master plan Step 4
